posts.content: Our work is now out in @natmed.nature.com www.nature.com/articles/s41... We developed a state-of-the-art AI-proteomics model for diagnosing multiple neurodegenerative diseases from blood plasma. ProtAIDe-Dx now outperformed both classic machine learning models and even foundation models like TabPFN!

interestSummary: Their recent focus is on applying AI to biomedical diagnostics, specifically the development of an AI-proteomics model for detecting neurodegenerative diseases from blood plasma.
